title: SOS (Save Our Sandwiches)
description:
Investigate a private luxury yacht on a dark and stormy night; humor abound in this point & click adventure. Do you like games with evil witches? What about sandwiches? Maybe bad demons or headless horsemen? It's all here in SOS (Save Our Sandwiches).

• Features inventory (access and exit inventory with ESC key)

• Click the screen to see a description of the room objects or get an item or change camera angle

• Features lots of ambience such as raining visuals and sounds

• Load game any time and access the save point to save the game

• Explore inside and outside of private luxury yacht, save the people aboard, and defeat the evils
description_short: Point & click aboard a private luxury yacht on a dark and stormy night with funny evil witches and sandwiches Features rain effects, exploration of an entire ship, puzzles, and monsters
